content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886


October 26, 2001


Ginny Vida, Executive Director
Ethics Commission
City & County of San Francisco
30 Van Ness Avenue, Suite 3900
San Francisco, CA 94102-6027

Re:   Your Request for Advice
      Our File No.  W-01-218

Dear Ms. Vida:

     This letter is in response to your recent inquiry of September 6, 2001, and
subsequent telephone message to me regarding the purpose of the letter. Given the nature
of your request, we are forwarding this matter to the Commission's Enforcement Division
and are withdrawing your request for advice. You will receive written confirmation by
the Enforcement Division on the receipt of your letter, and will be advised of their
determination as to whether they will proceed with the matter.

     If you have any other questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.


                                        Sincerely,


                                        Luisa Menchaca
                                        General Counsel


                                        By:   C. Scott Tocher
                                              Counsel, Legal Division

embedding.qa_text: This letter is from the Fair Political Practices Commission (FPPC) to Ginny Vida, Executive Director of the Ethics Commission for the City & County of San Francisco. The letter responds to Ms. Vida's recent inquiry and subsequent telephone message regarding the purpose of a letter. Given the nature of her request, the Commission is forwarding this matter to its Enforcement Division and withdrawing Ms. Vida's request for advice. The Commission will notify her in writing about the Enforcement Division's determination as to whether they will proceed with the matter. If Ms. Vida has any other questions, she should contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660. Sincerely, Luisa Menchaca General Counsel By: C. Scott Tocher Counsel, Legal Division
